title: Guru Mantra
intro: Read the Guru Mantra with meaning. Chant this mantra with devotion to receive the blessings of the Guru.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Gum Gurubhyo Namah.
or
Om Gurur Brahma Gurur Vishnu Gurur Devo Maheshwarah.
Guruh Sakshat Parabrahma Tasmai Shri Gurave Namah.

English Meaning

Om,
I bow to
the Guru.
or
The Guru is
Brahma,
Vishnu,
and Mahesh (Shiva).
The Guru is
the Supreme Absolute Reality.
I bow to
that revered Guru.

faq.q1: When should Guru Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Guru Mantra is considered auspicious when chanted in the morning, during Brahma Muhurta, or while worshipping the Guru.
faq.q2: How many times should Guru Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Guru Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting Guru Mantra is believed to bring wisdom, discernment, spiritual growth, and the blessings of the Guru.
faq.a4: Yes, anyone may chant Guru Mantra with faith and devotion.
faq.q5: Can Guru Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a5: Yes, Guru Mantra can be chanted every day with devotion.
